name: Tally
description: Chalk tallies counting something long forgotten on a slate wall — strokes lean, fade and strike through differently per redraw.

code.style: --lean: @rand(-5deg, 5deg); --rule: ( /* three strokes share one emitted chalk and spacing */ --chalk: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --ts: calc(@r(170, 210) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 24%; width: calc(34px / @Y); height: 52%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--chalk); opacity: @rand(0.6, 0.95); transform: rotate(var(--lean)); box-shadow: @var(--ts) 0 @var(--chalk), calc(@var(--ts) * 2) 0 @var(--chalk); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.5) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12%; top: 44%; width: 74%; height: calc(34px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); opacity: @rand(0.55, 0.9); transform: rotate(@rand(-58deg, -48deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
